reason: Agent successfully used GitHub tool to fetch and return authenticated username
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — page loaded with sidebar showing agents
Clicked "QA-20260421-192511-apeq" agent in sidebar — agent detail page opened with status "idle"
Verified agent status is "idle" — confirmed in status indicator (top right shows "idle")
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." in input field — message appeared in input
Clicked send button — message was sent and session "GitHub Username Verification Request" was created
Account Access Request card appeared asking "Allow access to GitHub to look up the authenticated username?" — GitHub account was already checked, clicked "Allow Access (1)" button
Clicked "Allow" button on "API Request Review" card for "GET /user" request — permission dialog appeared
Clicked "Allow Once" option — request was allowed to proceed
Waited for agent to complete processing — agent finished after ~15 seconds
Verified response includes GitHub username — response reads "Your GitHub username is yiw190." which clearly shows the GitHub username retrieved via the GitHub tool
